# Reflexive critique <span class="badge badge-draft1">✎ Very rough draft</span>

```{r}
#| include: false
if(file.exists("../_setup.R")){source("../_setup.R")}
```

## Development, testing, and validation of forensic methods

- Forensic methods themselves must be scrutinised
- Discard of flawed methods

## Examples of discarded or limited methods

### *p*-curve and *z*-curve

- Limitations that led to their exclusion from the main methods chapters

### STALT

- Issues with this method

### Other short-lived methods

- Alternative *p*-value approaches that were short-lived in the 2010s
